titles.title: Let the Peace of God Reign

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Father of life draw me closer Lord, my heart is set on You Let me run the race of time With Your life unfolding mine And let the peace of God Let it reign

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh Holy Spirit, Lord my comfort Strengthen me, hold my head up high And I stand upon Your truth Bringing glory unto You And let the peace of God Let it reign

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh Lord, I hunger for more of You Rise up within me, let me know Your truth Oh Holy Spirit, saturate my soul And let the life of God, fill me now Let Your healing power Breathe life and make me whole And let the peace of God Let it reign

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh Holy Spirit, Lord my comfort Strengthen me hold my head up high And I stand upon Your truth Bringing glory unto You And let the peace of God, let it reign (Lord, I hunger)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh Lord, I hunger for more of You Rise up within me, let me know Your truth Oh Holy Spirit, saturate my soul And let the life of God, fill me now Let Your healing power Breathe life and make me whole And let the peace of God, let it reign (Lord, I hunger)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh Lord, I hunger for more of You Rise up within me, let me know Your truth (Holy spirit) Oh Holy Spirit, saturate my soul And let the life of God, fill me now Let Your healing power Breathe life and make me whole And let the peace of God, let it reign (the life of God)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And let the life of God, fill me now Let Your healing power Breathe life and make me whole And let the peace of God, let it reign

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And let the life of God, fill me now Let Your healing power Breathe life and make me whole And let the peace of God, let it reign Let it reign, Lord, let it reign Let it reign, lord, Hallelujah! Let it reign Let it reign, ooh, ooh, ooh
